pageContext.name: Rancor Corbel Wall Decor
pageContext.description: Tucked away in the ornate detailing of Jabba the Hutt's™ Sail Barge, the Khetanna™ is a fantastic tribute to the Rancor™. Almost hidden, yet on a prominent pillar in the film, this adornment is sure to thrill. We're proud to present a wall decor piece that draws inspiration from that on-set artwork.  Using high-resolution 3D scanning of the original artifact, our approximately 18″ tall rancor corbel wall decor is hollow-cast in thick polyurethane resin. Each sculpture is hand-finished with a faux bronze look. Hand-applied patina accents the amazing details and wonderful organic sculpture and makes each a unique work of art.  They're 100% made-in-the-U.S.A. and come ready to display. Like our other Star Wars™-inspired decor pieces, this rancor-themed wall decor sculpture will bring some classic Star Wars style into to your home, office, man-cave or fan-cave today!
